description: Add an MCP tool ao.task.dependencies that returns the upstream (blocked-by) and downstream (blocks) dependency graph for a given task. Returns { task_id, blocked_by: [{ id, title, status }], blocks: [{ id, title, status }], is_blocked: bool, critical_path: [task_ids] }. Helps agents understand what must complete before their task and what their task unblocks. Also add ao.task.dependency-add and ao.task.dependency-remove for managing dependencies.
title: Add ao.task.dependencies MCP tool for querying dependency graph
